response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified song "群青讃歌" from on-screen text. Performed search "群青讃歌" Eve Japanese and English lyrics.
2. Identified song "ブレ―メン" from on-screen text. Performed search "ブレ―メン" n-buna Japanese and English lyrics.
3. Created scenes based on these song timestamps. Dialogue was excluded from scene tagging but served as the separator between performances.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed by VTubers, featuring "Gunjo Sanka" (originally by Eve) and "Bremen" (originally by n-buna/Yorushika), with a short dialogue interval in between.

scenes.description: VTubers performing "Gunjo Sanka" in a studio stage. Text "群青讃歌" appears on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
戻らない景色を見ていた
抱いた理由も、ここまで来た意味も
まだ終わらない旅路なんだ
いつか想いは形になって
この真っ白に染まる朝
忘れないように
諦めてしまうほど、この先沢山の
もう迷わない、迷いはしないよ
かけがえのないもの
溢れてしまうよ、答えは君のその手の中に
離さないで、物語は一歩先へ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I was looking at the scenery that won't return
Thinking of the reason I could embrace, and how I came this far
The journey that still hasn't ended
Someday, my thoughts will take shape
The morning that dyes in this pure white
The morning that I can't forget
I will give up, so many of these future things that I have, oh
I won't be lost, I won't get lost anymore, oh
There's nothing I can't change
It will overflow, the answer is in your hands
Don't let go, the story is one step ahead

scenes.description: VTubers performing "Bremen" in a studio stage. Text "ブレ―メン" appears on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ねえ考えなくていいよ
口先じゃわかりあえないの
この音に今は乗ろうよ
忘れないでいたいよ
身体は無彩色レイドバック
ただうねる雨音でグルーヴ
ずっと二人で暮らそうよ
この夜の隅っこで
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, not thinking about it is okay
Words alone won't really explain it anyway
So groove to the music and move along
I don't want to forget this song
Relaxing with this colorless body
And groove to the surging rain
Let's live, just the two of us, forever
In the corner of this night
